abilities.name: Grounded Thinking
abilities.text: When a friendly model within 2" resists a (+) action, it receives +1 to its stat.

abilities.name: Return to Innocence
abilities.text: When a friendly model removes a marker within 6" of this model, this model may place into base contact with the marker before it is removed.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

actions.name: Comprehensive Notes
actions.effects: This model may remove a Scheme marker within 2" of the target.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Rewrite the Story
triggers.text: When resolving, deal this action's damage to a different model within 6" of this model.

triggers.name: Daze
triggers.text: Target gains a Stunned token and this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: Unstable Ground
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a marker.
actions.effects: Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target must pass a TN 12 Df duel or gain a Staggered token. Then, remove the target.

triggers.name: Drawn to the Unknown
triggers.text: Move a friendly model within range up to 3" toward a marker in its LoS.
